html:
THE VENDETTA GAZETTE

Special Edition • March 22, 2026 • "All the Blood That's Fit to Print"

IRON TITANS CLASH AGAIN AS WU-TANG AND SIR CAPRICE CONTINUE THEIR BLOODY WALTZ

The streets of Vendetta City trembled once more this week as the two undisputed sultans of sin, Wu-Tang "The Iron Fist of the East Side" and the immaculately dressed Sir Caprice, continued their deadly dance for dominance. In a repeat performance that had the entire underworld holding its collective breath, Wu-Tang seized 103 fresh turfs while Sir Caprice claimed 102 territories in what can only be described as the most gentlemanly rivalry this side of hell.

The Oriental mastermind Wu-Tang unleashed his fury with 95 separate raids, proving that last week's reign of terror was merely an appetizer. Not to be outdone, the dapper Sir Caprice conducted 62 strategic strikes with the precision of a Swiss timepiece and the brutality of a Chicago Valentine's Day.

Meanwhile, the vacation-loving duo of Vacation Steve and Vacation Albert proved that relaxation and racketeering make perfect bedfellows, each claiming 42 turfs while presumably still nursing their tropical tans. Sources suggest these brothers in both blood and leisure have formed what insiders are calling "The Cabana Cartel."

Blood Captain, that crimson-coated commander of chaos, stormed his way to 28 new territories and executed a spectacular 95 raids throughout the week. His biggest score came courtesy of poor Nardong Putik, whose coffers were relieved of $500 in cold cash and 500 pieces of artillery in what witnesses describe as "the smoothest stick-up since Dillinger's heyday."

SPECIAL BULLETIN

HQ HOLOCAUST CONTINUES!

The week's most spine-tingling moment came when Wu-Tang's iron-fisted enforcers kicked down the doors of SPEROD's headquarters for the second time, proving that some lessons require repeated instruction! But the Oriental overlord wasn't finished with his educational program – his boys also schooled Aharhibaba, 2345p, and Muna in the finer points of territory management.

Sir Caprice, ever the gentleman scholar, contributed his own lessons by storming the headquarters of Jeeva1661, jan kooh, Reti, Joshie, and ayan. A staggering 31 headquarters fell this week, with Wu-Tang claiming 17 scalps and Sir Caprice adding 13 more trophies to his ever-growing collection!

FALLEN EMPERORS AND TUMBLING KINGS

The mighty continue their spectacular falls from grace, dear readers! The FIFTH BLOOD EMPEROR – that once-fearsome sovereign of the streets – hemorrhaged another 28 turfs this week, bringing his two-week losing streak to a catastrophic 51 territories. His royal treasury was also ransacked 29 separate times, suggesting his imperial guard might want to consider new employment opportunities.

StreetKing, whose crown has been slipping faster than a banana peel on wet pavement, lost another 27 turfs while enduring 26 brutal raids. Combined with last week's losses, this former monarch of mayhem has surrendered over 50 territories in a fortnight of pure humiliation.

Joining the parade of the fallen, Ustaz Ice watched his empire melt away with 23 lost turfs and 21 raids against his operations. The ice man certainly isn't so cool under pressure!

RISING STARS AND FRESH BLOOD

In a surprise twist that has the betting parlors buzzing, the politically ambitious Donald Trump muscled his way into the big leagues with 22 new turfs. Whether he's making the underworld great again or simply great at mayhem remains to be seen!

SCRIPTUS, the mysterious wordsmith of warfare, penned himself 20 new territories with literary precision, while the venerable GodFather reminded everyone why respect is earned with 15 fresh conquests.

Six brave souls dared to enter Vendetta City's blood-soaked playground this week, including the spectacularly named Flash Gordon, the war-painted John James Rambo 🩸, and four other hopefuls who each claimed their single turf in the urban jungle. Whether they'll survive their sophomore week remains as uncertain as a coin flip in a hurricane.

But for every dreamer who arrives, the streets claim their toll – 41 players vanished into the night this week, leaving behind only memories and empty territories for hungrier wolves to claim.

POLICE BLOTTER

• Officers responding to reports of "suspicious vacation activities" found only empty piña colada glasses and a note reading "Gone Fishing" at what was once Murphy's territory...

• The city's street sweepers filed a formal complaint about the increasing amount of "empire debris" they've been cleaning up around the FIFTH BLOOD EMPEROR's former strongholds...

• Local haberdashers report a surge in demand for bulletproof vests in pinstripe patterns, citing "a certain dapper gentleman's influence on underworld fashion"...
